---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible problem to help us improve AuraGo
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🕹️ Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📝 Error Logs & Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your problem. (Please strip out any private API keys or personal passwords from the logs before pasting!).

```text
# Paste relevant error logs here
```

## 💻 Environment Details
- **AuraGo Version**: (e.g. v2.0.1, or commit hash)
- **Deployment Method**: (e.g., automated one-liner, docker-compose, or built from source)
- **OS/Hardware**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Raspberry Pi 5 8GB)
- **LLM Provider & Model**: (e.g., OpenRouter with Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Local Ollama with Llama 3)
- **Go Version**: (if built from source, e.g. go1.26.4)

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., connected homelab integrations, network setup).
